---
title: "Gràfics per a la visualització dels resultats"
author: "Max Ranz de la Iglesia"
date: "2026-06-04"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(scales)

# Carpeta de sortida
dir.create("plots", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Paleta de colors consistent per a tots els gràfics
COLORS_METODES <- c(
  "Stepwise"      = "#E63946",
  "Bootstrap"     = "#457B9D",
  "Lasso"         = "#2A9D8F",
  "Elastic Net"   = "#E9C46A",
  "Boruta"        = "#9B5DE5",
  "Ranger"        = "#00FF00",
  "VSURF"         = "#F4A261"
)

COLORS_CORR <- c(
  "0"      = "#264653",
  "0.1"    = "#2A9D8F",
  "0.3"    = "#E9C46A",
  "random" = "#E76F51"
)
```

# Preparem les dades
```{r}
#carragar tots es RDatas

setwd("~/RESULTATS_TFG")

# Escenari 50%
load("resultats_step50_2.RData")      
load("resultats_boot_50_final.RData")
load("lasso50_v2_2.RData")
load("resultats_enet_50_2.RData")
load("resultats_boruta_50_correlacio.RData")
load("resultats_ranger_50.RData")
load("resultats_vsurf_50_correlacio.RData")  

# Escenari nul
load("resultats_sw_nul_2.RData")
load("resultats_fp_boot_nul_final_B20.RData")
load("resultats_fp_lasso_nul_aleat.RData")
load("resultats_fp_enet_nul_2.RData")
load("resultats_fp_boruta_nul.RData")
load("resultats_fp_vsurf_nul.RData")
load("resultats_fp_ranger_nul.RData")
```

```{r}
# Important: tenim un únic valor per escenari (mitjana)

# Escenari 50%
prep_50 <- function(df, nom_metode) {
  df %>%
    mutate(metode = nom_metode,
           correlation = as.character(correlation)) %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols      = c(Sensibilitat, Especificitat, VPP, VPN, Accuracy, NetBenefit),
      names_to  = "metrica",
      values_to = "valor"
    )
}

summary_total <- bind_rows(
  prep_50(resultats_step50,   "Stepwise"),
  prep_50(resultats_boot_50,   "Bootstrap"),
  prep_50(resultats_lasso,  "Lasso"),
  prep_50(resultats_enet,   "Elastic Net"),
  prep_50(resultats_ranger_50,     "Ranger"),
  prep_50(resultats_boruta, "Boruta"),  
  prep_50(resultats_vsurf, "VSURF")
) %>%
  mutate(
    metode      = factor(metode, levels = names(COLORS_METODES)),
    correlation = factor(correlation, levels = c("0", "0.1", "0.3", "random")),
    N           = as.character(N),
    pi          = as.character(pi)
  )

# Escenari nul
prep_nul <- function(df, nom_metode) {
  df %>%
    mutate(metode      = nom_metode,
           correlation = as.character(correlation))
}

fp_total <- bind_rows(
  prep_nul(resultats_sw,     "Stepwise"),
  prep_nul(resultats_fp_boot,   "Bootstrap"),
  prep_nul(resultats_fp_lasso,  "Lasso"),
  prep_nul(resultats_fp_enet,   "Elastic Net"),
  prep_nul(resultats_fp_ranger,     "Ranger"),
  prep_nul(resultats_fp_boruta, "Boruta"),
  prep_nul(resultats_fp_vsurf, "VSURF")
) %>%
  mutate(
    metode      = factor(metode, levels = names(COLORS_METODES)),
    correlation = factor(correlation, levels = c("0", "0.1", "0.3", "random")),
    N           = as.character(N),
    pi          = as.character(pi)
  )
```

# Escenari 50%

## Forest Plots
```{r}
forest_plot <- function(data, metrica_sel, linia_ref = NULL) {

  df <- data %>%
    filter(metrica == metrica_sel)

  # s'ordenen els mètodes per valor mitjà global (de menor a major)
  ordre <- df %>%
    group_by(metode) %>%
    summarise(m = mean(valor, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    arrange(m) %>%
    pull(metode)
  df$metode <- factor(df$metode, levels = ordre)

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = valor, y = metode,
                      color = correlation,
                      shape = correlation)) +
    geom_point(size = 4,
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.6)) +
    facet_grid(
      rows = vars(paste0("pi = ", pi)),
      cols = vars(paste0("N = ", N))
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = COLORS_CORR,
      name   = "Correlació",
      labels = c("0" = "ρ = 0", "0.1" = "ρ = 0.1",
                 "0.3" = "ρ = 0.3", "random" = "ρ aleatòria")
    ) +
    scale_shape_manual(
      values = c("0" = 16, "0.1" = 17, "0.3" = 15, "random" = 18),
      name   = "Correlació",
      labels = c("0" = "ρ = 0", "0.1" = "ρ = 0.1",
                 "0.3" = "ρ = 0.3", "random" = "ρ aleatòria")
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), labels = percent_format()) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("Forest plot — ", metrica_sel),
      x     = metrica_sel,
      y     = NULL
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#F0F4F8"),
      strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold"),
      legend.position  = "bottom",
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
    )

  if (!is.null(linia_ref) && !is.na(linia_ref)) {
    p <- p + geom_vline(xintercept = linia_ref,
                        linetype = "dashed",
                        color = "grey50",
                        linewidth = 0.6)
  }

  return(p)
}

# Generem i guardem un forest plot per cada mètrica
metriques_50 <- c("Sensibilitat", "Especificitat", "VPP", "VPN",
                  "Accuracy", "NetBenefit")
refs <- c(Sensibilitat = 0.5, Especificitat = 0.5, VPP = 0.5,
          VPN = 0.5, Accuracy = 0.5, NetBenefit = 0)

for (m in metriques_50) {
  p <- forest_plot(summary_total, m, linia_ref = refs[m])
  ggsave(paste0("plots/forest_", tolower(m), ".png"),
         plot = p, width = 10, height = 7, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
  print(p)
}
``` 


## Heatmaps
```{r}
heatmap_metrica <- function(data, metrica_sel) {

  df <- data %>%
    filter(metrica == metrica_sel) %>%
    mutate(
      escenari = paste0("N=", N, "\npi=", pi, "\nρ=", correlation)
    )

  # ordenem de manera descendent
  ordre_metode <- df %>%
    group_by(metode) %>%
    summarise(m = mean(valor, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    arrange(desc(m)) %>% pull(metode)

  ordre_escenari <- df %>%
    distinct(escenari, N, pi, correlation) %>%
    arrange(N, pi, correlation) %>%
    pull(escenari)

  df$metode   <- factor(df$metode, levels = ordre_metode)
  df$escenari <- factor(df$escenari, levels = ordre_escenari)

  ggplot(df, aes(x = escenari, y = metode, fill = valor)) +
    geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.6) +
    geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.3f", valor)),
              size = 3, color = "black") +
    scale_fill_gradient2(
      low      = "#D62828",
      mid      = "#F7F7F7",
      high     = "#1B4332",
      midpoint = 0.5,
      limits   = c(0, 1),
      name     = "Valor"
    ) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("Heatmap — ", metrica_sel),
      x     = "Escenari (N, pi, correlació)",
      y     = "Mètode"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      plot.title  = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 8),
      panel.grid  = element_blank()
    )
}

for (m in metriques_50) {
  p <- heatmap_metrica(summary_total, m)
  ggsave(paste0("plots/heatmap_", tolower(m), ".png"),
         plot = p, width = 14, height = 5, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
  print(p)
}

# Heatmap combinat (totes les mètriques excepte NetBenefit)
heatmap_combinat <- summary_total %>%
  filter(metrica != "NetBenefit") %>%
  mutate(
    escenari = paste0("N=", N, ", pi=", pi, ", ρ=", correlation),
    metrica  = factor(metrica,
                      levels = c("Accuracy", "Sensibilitat",
                                 "Especificitat", "VPP", "VPN"))
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = escenari, y = metode, fill = valor)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.2f", valor)),
            size = 2.5, color = "black") +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#D62828", mid = "#F7F7F7", high = "#1B4332",
    midpoint = 0.5, limits = c(0, 1), name = "Valor"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~metrica, ncol = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Heatmap combinat — totes les mètriques",
    x     = "Escenari",
    y     = "Mètode"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    plot.title  = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 55, hjust = 1, size = 7),
    strip.text  = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid  = element_blank()
  )

ggsave("plots/heatmap_combinat.png",
       plot = heatmap_combinat, width = 18, height = 16,
       dpi = 300, bg = "white")
print(heatmap_combinat)

```

# Escenari nul

## Gràfics de barres per mètode
```{r}
p_fp_barres <- ggplot(fp_total,
                      aes(x = metode, y = FP_percent * 100,
                          fill = correlation)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.7) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 5,
             linetype = "dashed", color = "red", linewidth = 0.8) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.4, y = 5.5,
           label = "Llindar 5%", color = "red",
           hjust = 0, size = 3.2) +
  facet_grid(
    rows = vars(paste0("pi = ", pi)),
    cols = vars(paste0("N = ", N))
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = COLORS_CORR,
    name   = "Correlació",
    labels = c("0" = "ρ = 0", "0.1" = "ρ = 0.1",
               "0.3" = "ρ = 0.3", "random" = "ρ aleatòria")
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")) +
  labs(
    title = " Ràtio de Falsos positius — Escenari nul",
    x     = "Mètode",
    y     = "Ràtio FP (%)"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
    axis.text.x      = element_text(angle = 35, hjust = 1),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#F0F4F8"),
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position  = "bottom"
  )

ggsave("plots/fp_barres.png",
       plot = p_fp_barres, width = 12, height = 8,
       dpi = 300, bg = "white")
print(p_fp_barres)
```


## Forest plot de FP
```{r}
p_fp_forest <- ggplot(fp_total,
                      aes(x = FP_percent * 100, y = metode,
                          color = correlation,
                          shape = correlation)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 5,
             linetype = "dashed", color = "red", linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_point(size = 4,
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.6)) +
  facet_grid(
    rows = vars(paste0("pi = ", pi)),
    cols = vars(paste0("N = ", N))
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = COLORS_CORR,
    name   = "Correlació",
    labels = c("0" = "ρ = 0", "0.1" = "ρ = 0.1",
               "0.3" = "ρ = 0.3", "random" = "ρ aleatòria")
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c("0" = 16, "0.1" = 17, "0.3" = 15, "random" = 18),
    name   = "Correlació",
    labels = c("0" = "ρ = 0", "0.1" = "ρ = 0.1",
               "0.3" = "ρ = 0.3", "random" = "ρ aleatòria")
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")) +
  labs(
    title = "Forest plot — Ràtio de Falsos positius — Escenari nul",
    x     = "Ràtio de FP (%)",
    y     = NULL
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#F0F4F8"),
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position  = "bottom",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

ggsave("plots/fp_forest.png",
       plot = p_fp_forest, width = 11, height = 7,
       dpi = 300, bg = "white")
print(p_fp_forest)

```

## Heatmap de FP
```{r}
p_fp_heatmap <- fp_total %>%
  mutate(
    escenari = paste0("N=", N, "\npi=", pi, "\nρ=", correlation)
  ) %>%
  {
    ordre_esc <- distinct(., escenari, N, pi, correlation) %>%
      arrange(N, pi, correlation) %>% pull(escenari)
    mutate(., escenari = factor(escenari, levels = ordre_esc))
  } %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = escenari, y = metode, fill = FP_percent * 100)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", FP_percent * 100)),
            size = 3.2, color = "black") +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low      = "#1B4332",
    mid      = "#F7F7F7",
    high     = "#D62828",
    midpoint = 5,
    name     = "Ràtio FP (%)"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Heatmap — Ràtio de Falsos positius — Escenari nul",
    x     = "Escenari (N, pi, correlació)",
    y     = "Mètode"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    plot.title  = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 8),
    panel.grid  = element_blank()
  )

ggsave("plots/fp_heatmap.png",
       plot = p_fp_heatmap, width = 16, height = 5,
       dpi = 300, bg = "white")
print(p_fp_heatmap)
```
